# MCP ツールリファレンス

### memory_save

Save a manual memory entry

| 引数 | 型 | 必須 | デフォルト | 説明 |
|------|------|------|------------|------|
| content | string | Yes | - | - |
| sessionId | string | Yes | - | - |
| projectPath | string | No | - | - |
| tags | string[] | No | - | - |
| scope | "project" \| "global" | No | "project" | - |

### memory_search

Search memories with hybrid search (keyword + vector)

| 引数 | 型 | 必須 | デフォルト | 説明 |
|------|------|------|------------|------|
| query | string | Yes | - | - |
| limit | number | No | 20 | - |
| projectPath | string | No | - | - |
| tags | string[] | No | - | - |
| allProjects | boolean | No | false | Search across all projects instead of scoping to projectPath |

### memory_list

List memories with pagination

| 引数 | 型 | 必須 | デフォルト | 説明 |
|------|------|------|------------|------|
| limit | number | No | 20 | - |
| offset | number | No | 0 | - |
| source | "manual" \| "auto" | No | - | - |
| tags | string[] | No | - | - |

### memory_update

Update an existing memory (content and/or tags)

| 引数 | 型 | 必須 | デフォルト | 説明 |
|------|------|------|------------|------|
| id | string | Yes | - | - |
| content | string | No | - | - |
| tags | string[] | No | - | - |

### memory_delete

Delete a memory by ID

| 引数 | 型 | 必須 | デフォルト | 説明 |
|------|------|------|------------|------|
| id | string | Yes | - | - |

### memory_cleanup

Delete old memories that have not been accessed recently

| 引数 | 型 | 必須 | デフォルト | 説明 |
|------|------|------|------------|------|
| olderThanDays | number | Yes | - | Delete memories not accessed in this many days |
| dryRun | boolean | No | true | Preview what would be deleted without actually deleting |

### memory_import

Import memories from JSON backup (re-computes embeddings)

| 引数 | 型 | 必須 | デフォルト | 説明 |
|------|------|------|------------|------|
| data | string | Yes | - | JSON string of exported memories array |

### memory_export

Export all memories as JSON for backup

引数なし

### memory_stats

Get memory storage statistics

引数なし

### memory_clear

Clear all memories

引数なし
